条件类型\n\n```ts\ntype IsString<T> = T extends string ? true : false;\n```\n\n## 总结\n\nTypeScript 的类型系统非常强大，值得深入学习。"}]}]}],"$L7"]}]],["$L8","$L9"],"$La"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"s7q1ZFLw7v5KEjELffPHn"}
